issue: Difficulty: ❌ EASY - Requires at least HARD for python

agent_report.changes_summary: Fixed instruction sufficiency by stating play_shift.py must use the verifier-started referee on http://127.0.0.1:5000 without spawning port 5000 itself. Hardened difficulty with unless_present cascades and post-release re-application in seq order, adding seed rows BUL-AA through BUL-AD, a matching failed_attempt_note, test_unless_present_reapplies_after_hold_release, and mirrored resolver updates in tests/helpers.py and solution/repair_cartridge.py. Bumped Dockerfile platform-revision to r16 and updated submission explanations and rubrics.
